steps_raw.instruction: Add 200 µL of 1mm beads to 1.5ml enppendorf tube
Add 600 µL of lysis solution to 1.5ml enppendorf tube
Add 200 µL of 0.5mm beads to 1.5ml enppendorf tube
Collect 9-10 µg of sample to 1.5ml enppendorf tube
Put 1.5ml eppendorf tube in the mixmill for sample crush; at condition: 30 rpm/s, for 4mins 00:04:00
Put 1.5ml eppendorf tube in centrifuge for centrifugation, at this condition: 17.0 x g, 25 °C, 3 minutes
Add 600 µL of DNA binding buffer to 1st well of 96 deep well plate
Add 200 µL of sample (lysate) from 15ml centrifuge microtube to 1st well of 96 deep well plate Usally add last
Add 25 µL of magnetic beads to 1st well of 96 deep well plate Shake the bottle and pipetting before using magnetic beads
Add 500 µL of Wash 1 to 2nd well of 96 deep well plate
Add 500 µL of Wash 2 to 3rd well of 96 deep well plate
Add 500 µL of Wash 2 to 4th well of 96 deep well plate
Add 100 µL of water to 5th well of 96 deep well plate
Put in the automated DNA extraction machine
